codeReview.summary: The prior durability gap is resolved at HEAD. `LocalSandboxSession::resume` now recreates a missing runner-owned workspace root before `restore_snapshot_if_needed()` rehydrates the snapshot-backed contents, so both interrupted `RunState` resumes and explicit `session_state` round-trips survive deletion of the original temp workspace while preserving approval continuation and prior files.

summary: Pass: re-reviewing the feature after commit `5ddcc50` shows the runner-owned workspace teardown case is now covered in both code and tests. I found no new blocking issues within this feature's scope.
